steps.name: Verificar se a secção Daily leaderboard é apresentada
Clicar no botão See all do ranking
Verificar se a janela/lista de rankings é apresentada
$("By.xpath: //*[contains(normalize-space(),'General ranking') or contains(normalize-space(),'RANKA') or contains(normalize-space(),'Daily leaderboard')]") should be(visible)
$("By.xpath: //*[contains(normalize-space(),'General ranking') or contains(normalize-space(),'RANKA') or contains(normalize-space(),'Daily leaderboard')]") is displayed()
Verificar se o ranking geral é apresentado
